title: CommunitySubmission
description: A community 'run the gauntlet' submission: one strategy claim, its $0 data provenance, the DECLARED honest N (every config tried), the declared null, the cost spec, and the file map the runner consumes. A submission is DATA ONLY (JSON/YAML/CSV/MD) — submitters never add executable code; the gates that score it are the repo's committed, tested primitives (validateStrategy / validateStrategyFamily via the crypto-edge CLI). The strategy/hypothesis specs referenced here use the repo's existing loaders: src/lib/spec/hypothesis-spec.ts (loadHypothesisSpec) and src/lib/spec/load-spec.ts (loadStrategySpec / loadCostSpec).

schemaVersion.description: Submission schema version. Bump only with a schema change.

submissionId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier; MUST equal the submission's directory name under submissions/.

name.description: The name to publish the verdict under (a SURVIVE is published with your name on it — and so is a KILL).

contact.description: Optional contact (email / X handle). Never required.

summary.description: ONE falsifiable sentence: what edge, in which market, over which horizon. State it so a KILL is meaningful.

mechanism.description: WHY the edge should exist (risk premium / flow / friction / behavioral bias / microstructure). 'A backtest looked good' is not a mechanism.

expectedFailureMode.description: Honest prior: the most likely binding gate and why (coincident long-beta, h=0 tautology, selection inflation, luckiest-of-N, carry sub-risk-free, holdout magnitude).

forward.description: Declare this ONLY for a forward / pre-registered live claim. Triggers the MANDATORY power pre-flight: if the declared window cannot reach 80% power at the expected true Sharpe, the submission is auto-DEFERRED as a SURVIVE attempt (it may still run as a forward watch).

windowYears.description: The declared forward scoring window, in years (26 weeks = 0.5).

expectedTrueSharpe.description: The TRUE annualized Sharpe you claim the mechanism delivers. Powered horizon ≈ ((1.96 + 0.8416) / SR)^2 years for 80% power.

lookSchedule.description: When the window is scored (e.g. 'quarterly'). The vault is consumed on schedule, never early.

selectionMode.description: Mirrors SelectionMode in src/lib/spec/hypothesis-spec.ts. preregistered_single = ONE config frozen from mechanism BEFORE looking at returns (honest N=1, requires declared.preregHash). searched_grid = a family; routed to `crypto-edge validate-family` (family-wise MAX-statistic null).

statistic.description: Statistic the gauntlet scores on (ReturnSeriesStatistic). Default compoundReturn for the single path, sharpe for the family path.

sources.description: Every source must be FREE, PUBLIC and KEY-LESS ($0 rule). Paid or keyed data disqualifies the submission.

endpoint.description: The exact public, key-less endpoint or bulk-file URL used.

series.description: The exact series pulled (symbols, field, cadence).

knownBiases.description: The biases the data carries — survivorship (delisted names present?), look-ahead / point-in-time, regime coverage, revisions. Use 'none_known' only if truly none. Mirrors DatasetSpec.known_biases.

honestN.description: EVERY distinct config you tried while developing this — counted up front, never 1-because-you-kept-one. For searched_grid it MUST equal the product of the strategy spec's configs grid sizes; for preregistered_single it MUST be 1 and requires preregHash.

null.description: The machine-checked surrogate mode (mirrors SurrogateType). Match the null to the claim: temporal timing -> phase/block; rotation / relative value -> cross_sectional; ANY searched grid -> family_max.

namedNull.description: Optional finer-grained named null from the lab taxonomy (e.g. 'calendar-reanchor', 'IAAFT', 'GARCH-sim', 'bracket-on-surrogate', 'shuffled-VRP', 'cross-sectional-shuffle'). Documents intent; the machine-run mode is `null` above.

preregHash.description: REQUIRED when honestN is 1: the configHash printed by `crypto-edge prereg <hypothesis.yaml> --json` (buildPreregistration). The runner recomputes it from the submitted hypothesis spec; a mismatch voids the N=1 claim.

preregCreatedAt.description: ISO-8601 instant the config was frozen (the --created-at passed to `crypto-edge prereg`). Informational; the hash covers only the frozen config.

files.description: Paths RELATIVE to the submission directory. Data files only.

strategyYaml.description: StrategySpec (loadStrategySpec) whose `configs` define the searched grid. REQUIRED for searched_grid (it is the `crypto-edge validate-family` input).

returnsCsv.description: Long CSV (date,return[,position]) of GROSS per-period strategy returns (parseReturnsCsv). REQUIRED for preregistered_single. Include the position column so turnover cost is charged on every |delta-position|.

panelCsv.description: Wide date+assets CSV (parsePanelCsv). For preregistered_single it seeds the buy-and-hold / equal-weight baselines (--baselines); for searched_grid it is the panel the family trades (--panel). ALWAYS required: no baselines, no certification.

costYaml.description: Optional CostSpec (loadCostSpec) for the leverage-aware cost model (--cost). Declare EVERY carry leg; financing is charged on the FULL levered/short notional.

fetchScriptNote.description: Optional path to a markdown note documenting EXACTLY how to re-fetch the CSVs from the $0 sources (commands/URLs). Reproducibility note, not executable code.

notes.description: Anything else the maintainer should know (e.g. 'this example KILLs by design').
